records.verbatim_request: Treat the XRP/HBAR Framework chat and the VTI Video Intelligence chat as two coordinated workstreams contributing to one governed Jarvis economic-intelligence system.
records.normalized_requirement: Coordinate exposed XRP/HBAR and VTI work through one governed Jarvis control plane while preserving each chat and repository as an independent specialist source.
records.notes: The other chat remains open; synchronization occurs only through exposed files, repositories, issues and explicit handoffs.

records.verbatim_request: Maintain separate specialist ownership: VTI for media evidence and XRP/HBAR for asset intelligence.
records.normalized_requirement: VTI owns media acquisition, transcription and evidence; XRP/HBAR owns asset analysis, demand pathways, catalysts, probabilities and scenarios; shared functions communicate through versioned contracts.
records.evidence_ref: VTI and Hub merged repository roles
records.notes: Duplicate functions remain preserved until semantic and implementation equivalence is proven.

records.verbatim_request: Never infer that Ripple/XRPL adoption automatically creates direct XRP demand, or that Hedera adoption automatically creates direct HBAR demand.
records.normalized_requirement: Every adoption event must map transaction value, token dependency, inventory requirement, liquidity lock, fee demand, velocity, substitution risk and source confidence before affecting XRP or HBAR price probabilities.
records.rollback_ref: Retain prior probability without unsupported uplift
records.notes: This is a mandatory probability-model gate, not an optional commentary field.

records.verbatim_request: Social or video claims are discovery inputs, not verified facts.
records.normalized_requirement: Preserve exact media evidence and creator metadata, classify it as discovery or contradiction input, and require independent primary-source verification before changing canonical findings or probabilities.
records.test_or_waiver: Media evidence cannot self-promote to verified finding
records.notes: Exact quotations, timestamps and source refs remain preserved even when a claim is rejected.

records.verbatim_response: The historical tracker lists VTI PRs 16, 17 and 18, Hub PR 11 and Jarvis PR 31 as open.
records.normalized_requirement: Preserve the old tracker as a timestamped historical snapshot but supersede its current repository-status rows with merged main-branch evidence.
records.rollback_ref: Do not roll back historical snapshot; revert only incorrect current-status overlay
records.notes: No historical percentages or source pointers were deleted.

records.verbatim_response: Source-control integration is merged; staging requires provider-admin deployment and vault-held secret references.
records.normalized_requirement: Deploy a non-production Hub ingress and VTI dispatcher, configure matching signing-secret references in provider vaults, execute valid/duplicate/invalid/correlation/retry/dead-letter/replay tests, and retain rollback evidence.
records.rollback_ref: Staging rollback procedure in integration runbook
records.notes: No secret values may be placed in chat, repositories, issues or logs.

gaps.description: The broader historical archive denominator is not yet locked at file, message, table and attachment level.
gaps.next_action: Import or expose the latest archive manifests, then record exact inventoried, processed, pending and inaccessible counts.

gaps.description: XRP and HBAR assistant-response lineage, adoption decisions and supersession links remain incomplete.
gaps.next_action: Process records in dated source order and link each request to all candidate responses and final adoption state.

gaps.description: Historical probability, trigger, table, influencer and discrepancy reconstruction remains incomplete.
gaps.next_action: Build batch 002 from the highest-authority dated historical XRP and HBAR source documents.

gaps.description: Live VTI-to-Hub staging integration is blocked on provider deployment and secret references.
gaps.next_action: Complete the provider-admin actions in Issue 47 without exposing secret values.
